subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-08 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: A goodly place it is for the healing arts and renowned it hath become. Haji Farajullah was an oculist who knew naught, yet thousands of eyes [he treated] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوب جائی است از برای طبابت و شهرت می کند.  حاجی فرج الله بود کحال  که هیچ نمی دانست و هزاران چشم
